Design System v0.8.0
Overview Foundations Components Themes Playground
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component
Navigation
  • Accordion Component
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component
Overlay
  • Drawer Component
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
Feedback

Progress Component

Fill-Bar für Usage-Limits, Upload-Status, generische Fortschritts-Anzeigen.

Beispiele

HTML anzeigen 
<div class="progress" role="progressbar"
     aria-valuenow="45" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100">
  <div class="progress__fill" style="width: 45%"></div>
</div>

Mit Label-Header

Bookings 45 / 100
…
HTML anzeigen 
<div class="progress-group">
  <div class="progress-group__header">
    <span>Bookings</span>
    <span>45 / 100</span>
  </div>
  <div class="progress">…</div>
</div>

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--progress-track Optional —
--progress-fill Optional —
--progress-height Optional —
--progress-radius Optional —

Modifier

  • .progress--thin — 0.25rem Höhe
  • .progress--thick — 1rem Höhe
  • .progress--success — / --warning / --danger farbvariante
Source-CSS ansehen
